key: listening10_allergy_table
text: Good evening. I sit down at the Grand Central Bistro. The waiter brings the menu. First, I tell him something important. I am allergic to nuts and I am allergic to shellfish. I ask the waiter, does the salad have nuts in it? He checks and says yes, it has nuts. So I ask, can you make it without nuts, please? Of course, he says. For the main course, I ask for a dish without dairy. The waiter recommends the grilled chicken with vegetables. It is not spicy and it has no dairy. Now I can eat my dinner safely.

key: listening10_phone_reservation
text: Hello, I would like to book a table for two for tonight, please. There is one important thing. I am allergic to shellfish, so I cannot eat shrimp or crab. Can you prepare safe dishes without shellfish? The restaurant says yes, of course, we can prepare safe dishes for you. Thank you very much. I feel happy and safe before my dinner.

key: Good evening. Are you ready to order?
text: Good evening. Are you ready to order?

key: Almost. First, I am allergic to nuts. Does the salad have nuts in it?

key: Thank you. I am also allergic to shellfish. Is there shellfish in the soup?
